# Description

# [PKT-EXT-001](task-0163): External Connector Contract and Mock

## Purpose

Define external connector contract and create mock connector.

## Scope

- Connector contract
- Mock implementation
- Test cases

## Implementation

1. Define contract
2. Implement mock
3. Add tests

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Contract defined
2. Mock works
3. Tests pass
